config.niche: I am looking for a technology or tech-enabled services company that provides compliance solutions to the specialty lending sector (not mortgage).

chat_history.content: Find me 5 differentiated I am looking for a technology or tech-enabled services company that provides compliance solutions to the specialty lending sector (not mortgage). companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US).

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 5 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.
